summary.lv: SPH Engineering (Latvijas dronu programmatūras uzņēmums — UgCS, Drone Show Software, ATLAS — klienti 150+ valstīs) meklē System Administrator / DevOps inženieri, kas uzturēs AWS infrastruktūru, Linux serverus, Docker/Nginx, Grafana monitoringu un Terraform/Ansible konfigurāciju. Hibrīds darbs Baložos.
summary.en: SPH Engineering — Latvian drone software company (UgCS, Drone Show Software, ATLAS) with customers in 150+ countries — is hiring a System Administrator / DevOps Engineer to maintain AWS, Linux, Docker/Nginx, Grafana monitoring and Terraform/Ansible IaC. Hybrid role in Baloži.
